name: Validate startup ideas and generate AI business plans with market and competitor research

parameters.content:
## AI Startup Idea Validator & Business Plan Generator

This workflow transforms a rough startup idea into a fully market-validated business plan using a sequential AI research pipeline. It runs market sizing, competitor mapping, demand validation, and competitive scoring before synthesizing everything into a structured 10-section business plan — delivered via email and logged to Google Sheets.

### Who's it for
- First-time founders validating early-stage concepts before committing resources
- Product managers exploring new market opportunities with data backing
- Entrepreneurs running lean validation before pitching investors
- Investors screening ideas quickly before deeper due diligence

### How it works
1. Founder submits a raw idea via webhook POST
2. AI expands the idea into a structured concept with problem, solution, revenue model, and key assumptions
3. Ideas scoring below 4/10 are filtered out immediately
4. Market research AI estimates TAM/SAM/SOM, growth rate, trends, and customer persona
5. Competitor analysis AI maps direct and indirect competitors, moat potential, and differentiation strategy
6. Python node scores the competitive position using data from the competitor AI output
7. Demand validation AI assesses PMF signals, risk factors, GTM strategy, and overall viability
8. JS node merges all research into a composite score and produces a PROCEED / VALIDATE_FURTHER / PIVOT_OR_ABANDON recommendation
9. Business plan AI synthesizes all research into a 10-section structured plan
10. Final report is emailed to the founder and logged to Google Sheets

### How to set up
1. Import this workflow into n8n
2. Add Anthropic Claude credentials and attach them to all five AI model nodes
3. Add SendGrid credentials and replace YOUR_SENDGRID_API_KEY
4. Add Google Sheets OAuth2 credentials on the tracker node
5. Replace YOUR_SHEET_ID in the Sheets node with your actual Spreadsheet ID
6. Replace founder@example.com and validator@yourdomain.com with real addresses
7. Activate and POST your idea to the webhook URL

### Requirements
- Anthropic Claude API key (claude-sonnet recommended for research quality)
- SendGrid API key for email delivery (or swap for native Gmail node)
- Google Sheets with OAuth2 credentials
- n8n instance with a publicly accessible webhook URL

### How to customize
- Lower or raise the idea viability threshold in Filter - Viable Ideas Only (default: score ≥ 4)
- Adjust AI temperature per node — lower for research accuracy, higher for creative business plan writing
- Add SerpAPI or Tavily web search tools to any AI node for real-time competitor and market data
- Extend the Google Sheet columns to track validation outcomes over time
- Chain a second workflow after the webhook response to auto-generate a pitch deck from the business plan

assignments.name: rawIdea
assignments.value: ={{ $json.idea || $json.body?.idea || 'AI-powered meal planning app for busy professionals' }}

parameters.text:
=You are an expert startup strategist and product thinker.

A founder has submitted the following rough idea:
"{{ $json.rawIdea }}"

Industry focus: {{ $json.targetIndustry }}
Budget stage: {{ $json.budgetRange }}

Your task: Expand this rough idea into a structured startup concept. Return a JSON object with EXACTLY these fields:
{
  "startupName": "Suggested working name",
  "oneLiner": "One sentence pitch",
  "problemStatement": "The core problem being solved",
  "proposedSolution": "The solution approach",
  "primaryTargetAudience": "Main customer segment",
  "secondaryTargetAudience": "Secondary segment if applicable",
  "coreValueProposition": "Why customers would choose this",
  "revenueModel": "How it makes money (SaaS/marketplace/etc)",
  "keyAssumptions": ["assumption 1", "assumption 2", "assumption 3"],
  "ideaScore": <number 1-10 based on clarity and potential>
}

Return ONLY the JSON. No markdown, no explanation.

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "ideaId": "{{ $json.ideaId }}",
  "startupName": "{{ $json.startupName }}",
  "compositScore": {{ $json.compositScore }},
  "recommendation": "{{ $json.recommendation }}",
  "pmfScore": {{ $json.demandData?.productMarketFitScore || 0 }},
  "message": "Validation complete. Business plan sent to your email."
}
